description:
In classify_two_clause, the function has two clauses that return different atom literals (:big vs :small) depending on the input. The spec for each callsite should carry a narrowed return Descr reflecting which branch fires for that argument, but the spec shows the wide union of both branches for every callsite.

Expected: spec key (int) → return :big ; spec key (int where x>10) → return :small (or equivalent per-clause narrowing).
Actual: return shows union of all clause returns regardless of entry arg.

Root cause: the spec derivation unifies clause returns rather than tracking per-clause path-sensitive return.
title: classify_two_clause: per-clause return not narrowed per spec key
